description_long: This object is a solar energy infrastructure installation featuring a set of rectangular solar panels mounted on a robust, dark-colored base structure. The panels are arranged in a linear row and are supported by a metallic frame, which elevates them above the main platform. The base includes several segmented sections, some of which appear to be covered with ribbed or slatted surfaces, possibly for ventilation or access. The installation also features yellow and black color accents, with some areas resembling electrical or control units integrated into the structure. The overall design suggests a ground-mounted solar array, likely intended for urban or industrial environments, with a focus on durability and efficient energy capture. The visible components indicate a modular and accessible layout, suitable for maintenance and integration with other urban infrastructure.
description: A ground-mounted solar energy installation with a row of rectangular solar panels on a sturdy, segmented base featuring metallic and colored accents. The structure is modular and designed for efficient energy capture and urban integration.
description_view_0: From this side view, the linear arrangement of the solar panels and the segmented, ribbed base structure are clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the yellow and black sections of the base, as well as the metallic frame supporting the solar panels.
description_view_2: The opposite side view shows the full length of the solar panel row and the detailed segmentation of the base structure.
description_view_3: From above, the rectangular layout of the panels and the modular sections of the base are most apparent.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 20 degrees, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with metallic (likely aluminum) frame and segmented base
attribute_array_configuration: single linear row of approximately 4 rectangular panels
